overall.description: A slow first-person exploration through a cozy, rustic cottage interior with wooden beams and warm lamplight. The camera moves continuously from a living area with bookshelves, through a kitchen with food preparation items, and up wooden stairs to an attic bedroom. High-quality game engine rendering with atmospheric lighting and detailed textures.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cozy rustic living room with wooden architecture and warm artificial lighting. The camera slowly pans right from a wooden staircase to reveal a seating area with a leather armchair, ottoman, and a large arched bookshelf. A brass floor lamp provides warm illumination over the patterned area rug.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wooden staircase, passing wall sconces, and enters an attic bedroom with sloped thatched ceilings. The space contains a wooden dresser with a bedside lamp and a bed with canopy drapes, all illuminated by warm artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic cottage interior that transitions from a cozy living area into a functional kitchen before ascending to a secluded attic bedroom. It begins by panning right from a wooden staircase to reveal a leather armchair and a large arched bookshelf illuminated by a warm brass floor lamp. As the camera advances, the living area recedes to the left to make way for a kitchen space featuring a wooden counter with food preparation items and a window draped in blue curtains. The perspective then shifts away from the kitchen counter, passing a wicker basket of red apples and a wall mirror before turning back toward the wooden staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs past glowing wall sconces to enter an attic bedroom characterized by sloped thatched ceilings, a wooden dresser, and a canopy bed.
